title: Shop Update!
excerpt: It's been a while since my mom went to Japan, but we finally put together some little kits from the goodies she got. The turquoise kraft Traveler's Notebook refill I've been using in a ton of my videos that is…
body:
It's been a while since my mom went to Japan, but we finally put together some little kits from the goodies she got. The turquoise kraft Traveler's Notebook refill I've been using in a ton of my videos that is only available in Japan is in this kit. We've also made sure to include some of my favorite things that I have been using in my projects, as I've gotten tons of inquiries as to where to get certain items. We even created a gold notebook using one of my favorite papers from my latest line and paired it in this kit with the gold brush marker that sold out really fast last time we made it available. And I got super excited when I created this watercolor cover, I commissioned a local print shop here in LA to help me recreate a limited amount so you could have a similar book in your hands. It really looks like I painted right on the cover, which is amazing. It's available on it's own in the shop here, and with a fun little kit here. For all the limited edition kits, check out the Paper Products section of our shop.

The cover is of the notebook cardstock and the inside includes 32 pages of 60 lb paper. It's a great size for notes or to be used as a journal. Disclaimer: you will be able to see on the other side of the pages if you stamp or use lots of ink from permanent markers. Feel free to use inspiration from my YouTube videos and transform this little book into your own work of art! As always, thanks for being amazing fangerines!
